title: ageratina salvadorensis
intro: Ageratina salvadorensis, also known as salvadorene ageratina or yerba de la lagrima, is a plant species in the mint family that is native to El Salvador and other parts of Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ageratina salvadorensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and pain, improve respiratory issues, and support digestive health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Ageratina salvadorensis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
